summary: Frontend-only e2e UI testing of the Davy Levy Link-in-Bio static site at 420px mobile viewport. All 48 assertions passed across header, socials, three dark cards, support card, footer, navigation to /ferramentas and /videos and back, external hrefs, target=_blank, border-radius 24px, orange CTA color, green pastel suporte bg, page background #F5F5F7, and no horizontal overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: TikTokIcon renders 3 stacked silhouettes (cyan + magenta + black) all at nearly the same offset — the TikTok glyph shape looks correct but the colored offsets are barely visible (x offsets 16.6/17.6/17.1). Not a functional bug; aesthetic only.

Minor: Profile and globe images are served from lh3.googleusercontent.com via Google Drive direct-download URLs which can be rate-limited or break if file sharing changes. Consider hosting on a CDN/static asset for resilience.

Minor: Suporte WhatsApp link uses generic wa.me/?text=... without a phone number; on desktop wa.me without a number lands on a 'share' page. Confirm with owner whether a specific WhatsApp number should be embedded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested at 420px viewport. All data-testids present and correct: profile-photo, profile-name, profile-bio, social-{instagram,facebook,tiktok,youtube}, card-{tv,ferramentas,videos,suporte}, card-tv-cta, partnership-email, ferramentas-page, videos-page, tool-{dehashed,jimpl,syncme}, video-{google-maps,tv-aberta,tres-ferramentas,google-storage}, back-to-home. All external links open in new tab. Navigation /, /ferramentas, /videos works.
